3013194.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3013194.description: A little girl loses her doll at the zoo, and Rico gives up his own doll to replace it. Private assures Rico that his good deed will come back to him. / When a raccoon shows up and starts stealing from the zoo animals, the penguins jump into action.

3013246.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
3013246.description: Felicity worries that her powers won't measure up at a party for the most powerful and popular citizens in Mythlandia. // An ancient Anubis king tests Miguel to see if he's ready to leave Mythlandia and become the next ruler.

3013286.title: Dorg van Dango
3013286.description: Dorg thinks his worst nightmare is needles, but when Fretta and Mr Munch go on a few dates, he realizes their budding romance is much worse! // The Magicals build shortcut tunnels so they can slide straight to every place in Normill.

3013354.title: SpongeBob
3013354.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3014155.title: SpongeBob
3014155.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3014240.title: SpongeBob
3014240.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3014275.title: Sanjay & Craig
3014275.description: Sanjay and Craig start a prank war with the prank master. // Sanjay and Craig disguise themselves to get free wings.

3014327.title: Sanjay & Craig
3014327.description: When the kids eat candy that makes good things taste bad forever, they set out on a quest to find an antidote. // A cool bass player who lives in an underground convenience store threatens to break up Sanjay and Craig's friendship.

3015133.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3015133.description: Kowalski's obsession with Doris the dolphin drives him to invent a love ray, the Love-U-Laser. // Told as a courtroom flashback, Kowalski unwisely revives Jiggles in a small, whipped cream-eating version.

3015188.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3015188.description: The Commissioner flips his lid. His toupee blows off and sticks to Maurice, who also gets red cheeks and a skinned tail, all by accident. // Shelly the ostrich gets stuck in drying cement and only Rico can save her.

3015233.title: SpongeBob
3015233.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3016179.title: SpongeBob
3016179.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3016238.title: SpongeBob
3016238.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3016346.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3016346.description: In order to get Theodore to do his bidding, Alvin tells Theodore that he has secret powers and can turn trash into candy. When Derek steals Theodore's candy, Theodore tells Derek that Alvin will get him back using his secret powers. Now Alvin has to come

3016365.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3016365.description: When Alvin gets hurt, Simon agrees to face off against Derek on a survival reality show, where there's room for only one winner. Is playing dirty the only way to win?

3017140.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3017140.description: Hoping to impress her fashion idol, Brittany takes up painting. But her idol only likes her art after Alvin accidentally ruins it. Now Brittany thinks she's an artist ready for a big exhibition.

3017185.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3017185.description: The Penguins are faced with a global battle when their specialty food-making machine belches out a toxic cloud that threatens not just the zoo, not just the city, but the earth itself!

3017280.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3017280.description: When Roger's home in the sewer becomes unbearable the Penguins try to find him a new home in the city. Soon citizens of New York city spot Roger all over town. // The Penguins have to protect the City Zoo Commisioner from Frankie the pigeons wrath.

3017332.title: The Loud House
3017332.description: While on a field trip, Lincoln worries that his friend group is splintering. // In order to buy her dream car, Lori becomes a local rideshare driver.

3018051.title: Huize Herrie
3018051.description: Now the oldest in the house, Leni struggles to follow in Lori's footsteps as the family's babysitter. // Secret agents Lincoln and Clyde investigate the Loud's suspicious new neighbors.

3018131.title: De Casagrandes
3018131.description: When Ronnie Anne realizes that she's not up to date on all of the latest trends, she seeks help from Carlota. // Bobby struggles to find Sergio after wishing he would fly away and never come back.

3018185.title: De Casagrandes
3018185.description: Carlota worries that her family will embarrass her after her vlog is discovered by a famous musician. // Hector becomes Ronnie Anne and Carl's newest classmate after deciding to finish his schooling.

3018257.title: SpongeBob
3018257.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3019089.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3019131.title: SpongeBob
3019131.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3019185.title: De avonturen van Kid Danger
3019185.description: The group's vacation is cut short when Jasper falls into a volcano & is held captive by the Volcaniacs.

3019246.title: Dorg van Dango
3019246.description: It's Taco Tuesday and there's a taco shell shortage in town. Patronella casts a spell that ends up going wrong. / A high-tech rival store opens up across from the 98 Cent Store, Dorg and the gang use their powers to keep his mom in business!

3020046.title: Sanjay & Craig
3020046.description: Sanjay and Craig make a bet to see who can live the longest in the wild. // A highly-competitive game of de-pantsing sweeps Lundgren.

3020112.title: Sanjay & Craig
3020112.description: A group of young kids idolize Sanjay and Craig. // Sanjay and Craig bottle Hector's divine-smelling sweat and sell it as cologne.

3020194.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3020194.description: A little girl loses her doll at the zoo, and Rico gives up his own doll to replace it. Private assures Rico that his good deed will come back to him. / When a raccoon shows up and starts stealing from the zoo animals, the penguins jump into action.

3020260.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3020260.description: When the zoo starts feeding them imitation fish cakes, the penguins take matters into their own flippers and hatch a plan to hijack a fish delivery truck.

3021035.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3021035.description: Timmy accidentally wishes both of his parents into a dangerous, never-ending surf-off! // When Mom and Dad mistake Cosmo for a ghost and restart their failed ghost-hunting business, Timmy wishes that the fairies would pretend to haunt Dimmsdale.

3021109.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3021109.description: While the Mighty Mutanimals lay siege to TCRI, the Turtles must brave the bizarre world of Dimension X to save the enslaved people of New York.

3021174.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3021174.description: Casey Jones thinks he can take on the criminal underworld on his own, but he soon finds himself in over his head

3021224.title: Ollie's Pack
3021224.description: Ollie pulls a role model monster dad out of the pack to teach him how to shave for the first time. // It's vacation day and Ollie, his mom, and pals pack up the car for a road trip to Sploosh Mountain.

3022082.title: SpongeBob
3022082.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3022136.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3022136.description: Po disobeys Shifu's orders and looks into the Mystical Mirror of Yin and Yang, creating two versions of himself: one good and one evil!

3022216.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3022216.description: When Temutai kidnaps a kung fu master, Shifu turns to Po for help.
